case_title: JOSE RODRIGUEZ VS. UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
